classObjective: Apply the Distance Formula to solve real-world problems.
workedExamples: 10-4, Example 4 — Apply the Distance Formula to Real-World Problems (Map Scales, Sports, Grid-Based Distance)
warmUp: How would you find the straight-line distance between two cities on a map?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: map scale application; sports applications; grid-based distance problems; real-world Distance Formula application
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice applying the Distance Formula to real-world contexts
independentPractice: Practice problems applying Distance Formula to real-world scenarios including maps and sports
assessment: Exit ticket: use the Distance Formula to find how far apart two GPS coordinates are in a real-world navigation context
capReflection: What real-world measurements would be inaccurate if you used a road distance rather than the straight-line distance?
